info.title: Prism Kanban API — Task Detail & Edit
info.description: OpenAPI spec for the task detail side panel feature. This feature uses one existing endpoint (PUT /spaces/:spaceId/tasks/:taskId) with no new backend endpoints. This document formally specifies the contract consumed by the new TaskDetailPanel component and the updateTask API client function.

put.description: Partially updates one or more fields of an existing task. Only fields present in the request body are modified. The server applies a partial-update strategy: keys absent from the body are left unchanged. An empty string for 'description' or 'assigned' deletes that field from the task.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description: The space that contains the task.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task to update.

updateType.summary: Auto-save type on segmented control change

clearAssigned.summary: Clear assigned field (empty string deletes it)

value.description: Implement JWT-based authentication with refresh tokens.

200.description: Task updated successfully. Returns the complete updated task object.

400.description: Validation error — one or more fields in the request body are invalid.

invalidType.summary: Type value not in allowed enum

error.message: The task type is not valid.
The task you tried to edit no longer exists.
error.suggestion: Refresh the board to see the latest tasks.

error.message: The space containing this task no longer exists.
error.suggestion: Refresh the page to see available spaces.

error.message: Something went wrong while saving your changes.
error.suggestion: Please try again. If the problem persists, restart the server.

UpdateTaskPayload.description: Partial update payload for a task. At least one field must be present. Only provided fields are modified; absent fields are left unchanged on the server.

title.description: New title for the task. Will be trimmed of leading and trailing whitespace. Must not be empty after trimming.

type.description: Task type. 'task' displays an orange badge; 'research' displays a blue badge.

description.description: Free-form description. An empty string ('') deletes the description field from the task. Will be trimmed.

assigned.description: Name of the assigned agent. An empty string ('') deletes the assigned field from the task. Will be trimmed.

id.description: Unique identifier of the task (server-generated UUID).

description.description: Optional free-form description. Absent if never set or explicitly cleared.

assigned.description: Optional assigned agent name. Absent if never set or explicitly cleared.

attachments.description: File and text attachments. Managed by the AttachmentModal — not editable via this panel.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp. Set by the server on task creation. Never modified.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp. Updated by the server on every successful PUT. Refreshes in the panel footer after save.

content.description: Inline text content (type=text) or absolute file path (type=file).

message.description: Human-readable error message. Must be understandable without technical knowledge.

suggestion.description: Actionable hint for the user on how to fix or recover from the error.

field.description: Present only for VALIDATION_ERROR. Names the request body field that failed validation.

UpdateTaskPayload.typescript: interface UpdateTaskPayload { title?: string; type?: 'task' | 'research'; description?: string; assigned?: string; }

apiClientFunction.signature: updateTask(spaceId: string, taskId: string, patch: UpdateTaskPayload): Promise<Task>
